debug_option.description: Enable JTAG debugging and traces for all execution levels.
Enable JTAG debugging and traces for SAIL hypervisor.
Enable JTAG debugging and traces for SAIL Core 0.
Enable JTAG debugging and traces for SAIL Core 1.
Enable JTAG debugging and traces for SAIL Core 2.
Enable JTAG debugging and traces for SAIL Core 3.

fuse.name: READ_PERMISSIONS_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-read-permissions-write-disable. Disables further QFPROM changes to the this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: WRITE_PERMISSIONS_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-write-permissions-write-disable. Disables further QFPROM changes to the this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: FEC_ENABLES_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-fec-enables-write-disable. Disables further QFPROM changes to the this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: OEM_CONFIGURATION_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-oem-configuration-write-disable. Disables further QFPROM changes to the this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: PUBLIC_KEY_HASH_0_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-public-key-hash-0-write-disable. Disables further QFPROM changes to the this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot-write-disable. Disables further QFPROM changes to the this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned. Once blown no further changes possible to QFPROM sheet via sec.elf.

fuse.name: IMAGE_ENCRYPTION_KEY_1_WRITE_DISABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-image-encryption-key-1-write-disable. Disables further QFPROM changes to the this region. Blow this bit after the region has been completely provisioned.

fuse.name: PDU_FEC_ENABLE
fuse.description: No FEC; Shadow double redundancy. This fuse is used to enable the Forward Error Correction for this region (if applicable).

fuse.name: SAIL_BIST_CONFIG_FEC_ENABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-sail-bist-config-fec-enable. FEC supported. This fuse is used to enable the Forward Error Correction for this region (if applicable).

fuse.name: OEM_IMAGE_ENCRYPTION_KEY_FEC_ENABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-oem-image-encryption-key-fec-enable. FEC supported. This fuse is used to enable the Forward Error Correction for this region (if applicable).

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT_FEC_ENABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot-fec-enable. FEC supported. This fuse is used to enable the Forward Error Correction for this region (if applicable).

fuse.name: IMAGE_ENCRYPTION_KEY_1_FEC_ENABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-image-encryption-key-1-fec-enable. FEC supported. This fuse is used to enable the Forward Error Correction for this region (if applicable).

fuse.name: OEM_SPARE_30_FEC_ENABLE
fuse.description: No FEC; No redundancy. This fuse is used to enable the Forward Error Correction for this region (if applicable).

fuse.name: OEM_SPARE_31_FEC_ENABLE
fuse.description: No FEC; No redundancy. This fuse is used to enable the Forward Error Correction for this region (if applicable). 0x0: DISABLE - Disable 0x1: ENABLE - Enable.

fuse.name: E_DLOAD_DISABLE
fuse.description: SW only use for Boot. Disable the removable SD and then USB downloader in Apps PBL error handler, as well as the method to force download during code boot via magic cookies in IMEM.

fuse.name: ENUM_TIMEOUT
fuse.description: SW only use for Boot. BOOT ROM must support USB enumeration timeout. Timeout applies to both enumeration for FLCB (fast low current boot) and USB download mode. If USB is not enumerated within time (90 seconds), quit USB enumeration If USB suspend or disconnected after enumeration, start timer again.

fuse.name: FORCE_DLOAD_DISABLE
fuse.description: SW only use for Boot. To disable method to force boot from USB via GPIO or magic number in RAM.

fuse.name: FAST_BOOT
fuse.description:
These fuses are used by boot code to specify which device has priority to be booted from. For SRV1L/SA8620P/SA7255P, the mapping is as follows:
Following change is needed for fast boot options: 0: Default OSPI 1: QSPI 2: OSPI.

fuse.name: SPI_CLK_BOOT_FREQ
fuse.description: Default is 37.5 MHz and when blown 19.2 MHz.

fuse.name: SW_FUSE_PROG_DISABLE
fuse.description: This fuse disables the ability to write fuses through the software interface.

fuse.name: PBL_FDL_TIMEOUT_RESET_FEATURE_ENABLE.
fuse.description: Fuse bit to reset device if PBL enters into EDL mode unintentionally.

fuse.name: WDOG_EN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-wdog-en. Combined with GPIO Wdog disable (connects to MPM). Prevents the Watch Dog from being disabled by the GPIO.

fuse.name: PBL_LOG_DISABLE
fuse.description: SW only use for Boot. Control logging mechanism in Boot ROM (If blown, Logging is disabled & mandated for external parts).

fuse.name: ROOT_CERT_TOTAL_NUM
fuse.description: Defines the total root cert number supported from the certificate (Upto 4 roots).

fuse.name: IMAGE_ENCRYPTION_ENABLE
fuse.description: This bit when blown, is used to indicate that the QC and OEM Encryption key regions will be used to store the image encryption root keys. When this bit is unblown, these regions will not be used.Note that this bit only 'enables' the image encryption feature, and is NOT an encryption enforcement bit. With image encryption enabled, the chip can boot with either encrypted or plaintext images (the image has meta-data to indicate if the image is encrypted or not).

fuse.name: USB_SS_DISABLE
fuse.description: Used to disable USB SS enumeration during Boot.

fuse.name: MSS_HASH_INTEGRITY_CHECK_ENABLE
fuse.description: Enables Hash computation/verification of individual ELF segments in PBL.

fuse.name: DEBUG_POLICY_DISABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-debug-policy-disable. Debug Policy is bypassed when this bit is 1. Debug Policy provides a means to re-enable debug capabilities under OEM-specified selectable conditions.

fuse.name: ALL_DEBUG_DISABLE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-all-debug-disable. This fuse permanently disables all debug of the chip. This should only be blown once the OEM is done with their development and testing. No RMAs are possible after this fuse is blown.

fuse.name: SAIL_DBGEN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-dbgen. SAIL DBGEN.

fuse.name: SAIL_NIDEN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-niden. SAIL NIDEN.

fuse.name: SAIL_HIDEN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-hiden. SAIL HIDEN.

fuse.name: SAIL_HNIDEN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-hniden. SAIL HNIDEN.

fuse.name: SAIL_C0_DBGEN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-c0-dbgen. SAIL C0 DBGEN.

fuse.name: SAIL_C0_NIDEN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-c0-niden. SAIL C0 NIDEN.

fuse.name: SAIL_CPU_SCAN_EN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-cpu-scan-en. SAIL CPU SCAN EN.

fuse.name: SAIL_DCC_SCAN_EN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-dcc-scan-en. SAIL DCC SCAN EN.

fuse.name: SAIL_C1_DBGEN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-c1-dbgen. SAIL C1 DBGEN.

fuse.name: SAIL_C1_NIDEN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-c1-niden. SAIL C1 NIDEN.

fuse.name: SAIL_C2_DBGEN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-c2-dbgen. SAIL C2 DBGEN.

fuse.name: SAIL_C2_NIDEN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-c2-niden. SAIL C2 NIDEN.

fuse.name: TZ_SW_CRYPTO_FIPS_ENABLE
fuse.description: Enable FIPS mode for TZ software crypto. Disable by default and blow to enable.

fuse.name: TZ_SW_CRYPTO_FIPS_OVERRIDE
fuse.description: Override TZ_SW_CRYPTO_FIPS_ENABLE fuse. Non-override by default and blow to override the TZ_SW_CRYPTO_FIPS_ENABLE fuse to disable the FIPS feature in TZ.

fuse.name: SPARE_REG30_SECURE
fuse.description: This fuse determines if the corresponding OEM spare region is treated as secure. If blown, it indicates secure, and the region has the properties of a customer private key, and is not readable through SW while debug is enabled._x000D_ * This region is reserved for DOLBY and will be blown by QC.

fuse.name: SPARE_REG31_SECURE
fuse.description: This fuse determines if the corresponding OEM spare region is treated as secure. If blown, it indicates secure, and the region has the properties of a customer private key, and is not readable through SW while debug is enabled._x000D_ * This region is reserved for DOLBY and will be blown by QC.

fuse.name: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT0
fuse.description: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT_0 will be used to determine hash computation algorithm.

fuse.name: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT1
fuse.description: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT_1 will be used to determine hash computation algorithm.

fuse.name: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT2
fuse.description: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT_2 will be used to determine hash computation algorithm.

fuse.name: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT3
fuse.description: SEGMENT_HASH_FUNCTION_SELECT_3 will be used to determine hash computation algorithm.

fuse.name: SAIL_DEBUG_BUS_DISABLE
fuse.description: SAIL DEBUG BUS.

fuse.name: SAIL_C3_DBGEN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-c3-dbgen. SAIL C3 DBGEN.

fuse.name: SAIL_C3_NIDEN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-sail-c3-niden. SAIL C3 NIDEN.

fuse.name: EKU_ENFORCEMENT_EN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-eku-enforcement-en. When this fuse is blown will enable enforcement of the EKU field in the certificate.

fuse.name: DISABLE_RSA
fuse.description: When this bit is 0 and signed image type is SHA384 + RSA/ECC is 0 => RSA OPERATION_x000D_ When this bit is 0 and signed image type is SHA384 + RSA/ECC IS 1=> ECC OPERATION USING PKA IP_x000D_ When this bit is 1 and signed image type is SHA384 + RSA/ECC is 0 => Error_x000D_ When this bit is 1 and signed image type is SHA384 + RSA/ECC IS 1=> ECC OPERATION USING PKA IP.

fuse.name: OEM_HW_ID
fuse.description: The OEM hardware ID. Bits 15:0.

fuse.name: OEM_PRODUCT_ID
fuse.description: The OEM product ID. Bits 15:0.

fuse.name: PERIPH_PID
fuse.description: Bits 15:0 of the PID.

fuse.name: PERIPH_VID
fuse.description: Bits 15:0 of the VID.

fuse.name: ANTI_ROLLBACK_FEATURE_EN
fuse.description: Recommended value is --fuse-anti-rollback-feature-en=0x3. Bit 0 - SAIL_HYP_ANTI_ROLLBACK_EN Bit 1 - SAIL_SW_ANTI_ROLLBACK_EN.

fuse.name: PK_HASH_0
fuse.description: Hash of OEM Root cert.

fuse.name: OEM_IMAGE_ENCRYPTION_KEY
fuse.description: This is the 128-bit encryption key used by UIE to decrypt images. when UIE Key Select is set to 0.

fuse.name: FEC_186
fuse.description: FEC autocalculated based on 56 bits in the row.

fuse.name: FEC_187
fuse.description: FEC autocalculated based on 56 bits in the row.

fuse.name: FEC_188
fuse.description: FEC autocalculated based on 56 bits in the row.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX0
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot1-rom-pk-hash-idx0. Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX1
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot1-rom-pk-hash-idx1. Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX2
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot1-rom-pk-hash-idx2. Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX3
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot1-rom-pk-hash-idx3. Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_PK_HASH_IN_FUSE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot1-pk-hash-in-fuse. Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_AUTH_EN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot1-auth-en. Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT1_USE_SERIAL_NUM
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot1-use-serial-num. Boot Segment for Apps & other peripheral images.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT2_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX0
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot2-rom-pk-hash-idx0. Boot segment for MBA image.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT2_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX1
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot2-rom-pk-hash-idx1. Boot segment for MBA image.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT2_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX2
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot2-rom-pk-hash-idx2. Boot segment for MBA image.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT2_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX3
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot2-rom-pk-hash-idx3. Boot segment for MBA image.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT2_PK_HASH_IN_FUSE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot2-pk-hash-in-fuse. Boot segment for MBA image (Must be blown for legacy reasons).

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT2_AUTH_EN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot2-auth-en. Boot segment for MBA image (Must be blown for legacy reasons).

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT2_USE_SERIAL_NUM
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot2-use-serial-num. Boot segment for MBA image.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT3_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX0
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot3-rom-pk-hash-idx0. Boot segment for Modem image.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT3_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX1
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot3-rom-pk-hash-idx1. Boot segment for Modem image.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT3_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX2
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot3-rom-pk-hash-idx2. Boot segment for Modem image.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT3_ROM_PK_HASH_IDX3
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot3-rom-pk-hash-idx3. Boot segment for Modem image.

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT3_PK_HASH_IN_FUSE
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot3-pk-hash-in-fuse. Boot segment for Modem image (Must be blown for legacy reasons).

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT3_AUTH_EN
fuse.description: Recommendation is to provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot3-auth-en. Boot segment for Modem image (Must be blown for legacy reasons).

fuse.name: OEM_SECURE_BOOT3_USE_SERIAL_NUM
fuse.description: Recommendation is to not provide --fuse-oem-secure-boot3-use-serial-num. Boot segment for Modem image.

fuse.name: FEC_189
fuse.description: FEC autocalculated based on 56 bits in the row.

fuse.name: IMAGE_ENCRYPTION_KEY_1
fuse.description: This is the 128-bit encryption key used by UIE to decrypt images. when UIE Key Select is set to 1.

fuse.name: FEC_252
fuse.description: FEC autocalculated based on 56 bits in the row.

fuse.name: FEC_253
fuse.description: FEC autocalculated based on 56 bits in the row.

fuse.name: FEC_254
fuse.description: FEC autocalculated based on 56 bits in the row.
